data.title: Docker-udrulning
data.description: Deploy @webhouse/cms med Docker вҖ” kombineret eller opdelt arkitektur, Docker Hub, GitHub Container Registry og Fly.io.
data.content:
## To udrulningsmodeller

@webhouse/cms understГёtter to Docker-udrulningsarkitekturer:

### Model 1: Kombineret (alt-i-Г©n)

CMS admin + dit site i Г©n container. Simpleste setup вҖ” Г©t deploy, Г©n URL, Г©n server.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ         Docker Container         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ  в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ CMS Adminв”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  Dit Site    в”Ӯ в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ :3010    в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ  :3000       в”Ӯ в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ              в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ         в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ /content в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ         (delt filsystem)        в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

**Bedst til:** Solo-projekter, prototyping, smГҘ sites.

### Model 2: Opdelt (to containere)

CMS admin pГҘ Г©n server, dit site pГҘ en anden. Sitet modtager indholdsopdateringer via signerede webhooks.

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    webhook     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  CMS Admin  в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖвҶ’в”Ӯ  Dit Site    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  :3010      в”Ӯ   content push в”Ӯ  :3000       в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  fly.io/a   в”Ӯ                в”Ӯ  fly.io/b    в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ                в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

**Bedst til:** Produktionssites, teams, uafhГҰngig skalering.

---

## Container images

```bash
# Hent fra GitHub Container Registry
docker pull ghcr.io/webhousecode/cms-admin:latest

# KГёr med dit sites content-mappe mounted
docker run -p 3010:3010 \
  -v $(pwd)/cms.config.ts:/app/cms.config.ts \
  -v $(pwd)/content:/app/content \
  ghcr.io/webhousecode/cms-admin:latest
```

---

## Deploy til Fly.io

### Kombineret (Г©n app)

```bash
fly apps create my-site
fly deploy --now
```

### Opdelt (to apps)

```bash
# Deploy CMS admin
cd admin/ && fly apps create my-site-admin && fly deploy --now

# Deploy site
cd site/ && fly apps create my-site && fly deploy --now

# KonfigurГ©r webhook: CMS admin вҶ’ site
# I CMS admin вҶ’ Site Settings вҶ’ Revalidation
```

---

## FГёrste opstart: auto-oprettet admin-konto

Ved fГёrste start opretter CMS admin automatisk en standard admin-konto. SГҰt det initiale password via miljГёvariabel:

```bash
fly secrets set ADMIN_PASSWORD=$(openssl rand -hex 16)
```

---

## MiljГёvariabler

| Variabel | PГҘkrГҰvet | Beskrivelse |
|----------|----------|-------------|
| `ADMIN_PASSWORD` | FГёrste start | Initialt admin-password |
| `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` | AI-funktioner | Claude API-nГёgle |
| `REVALIDATE_SECRET` | Opdelt mode | Webhook HMAC-secret |
| `GITHUB_TOKEN` | GitHub-adapter | Fine-grained PAT |

---

## Hurtigreference

| Opgave | Kommando |
|--------|----------|
| Hent seneste image | `docker pull ghcr.io/webhousecode/cms-admin:latest` |
| KГёr lokalt | `docker run -p 3010:3010 -v $(pwd):/app ghcr.io/webhousecode/cms-admin` |
| Deploy til Fly.io | `fly deploy --now` |
| SГҰt secrets | `fly secrets set KEY=value` |
| Se logs | `fly logs` |
